architecture_decisions.decision: No production code changes in Story 07
architecture_decisions.rationale: All Alpine removal code changes completed in Stories 01-06. Story 07 validates that gates are green and documents release readiness. Boy-scout test cleanup (stale alpine fixture names/URLs/comments) is allowed and does not touch production code.

AC13 requires a real Ubuntu host VM and live Lima provisioning. The automated test suite (968 unit/integration tests) validates all code paths. AC13 is inherently a human-run validation that requires infrastructure not available in the automated pipeline.

architecture_decisions.decision: Version bump and release tag are user-executed actions
architecture_decisions.rationale: Per team-lead instructions: no version bump, no tag, no push in this story. The architect documents the required release actions for the user to execute manually.

boy_scout_cleanups: tests/test_provisioner.py: Renamed test_alpine_without_opencode_not_blocked → test_codex_without_opencode_excludes_opencode_role; vm_name='clauded-alpine-no-opencode' → 'clauded-codex-no-opencode'. Test logic unchanged.
tests/test_lima.py: Changed fixture URL 'custom-alpine.qcow2' → 'custom-image.qcow2'. Removed stale 'Lima user provisions fail on Alpine due to home directory permissions' comment.

allowed_hits.src/clauded/linguist/languages.yml: External linguist data — 'Alpine Abuild' programming language entry unrelated to OS choice (explicitly documented in AC12)
allowed_hits.tests/test_config.py (TestAlpineConfigRe: FR5 rejection tests required by AC11
allowed_hits.tests/test_database.py (redis:7-alpine): Docker container image tag, not OS distro choice
allowed_hits.tests/test_documentation.py (test_no_ope: Guard test checking absence of opencode-alpine in src/
allowed_hits.tests/test_version_check.py (distro: alp: Legacy VM metadata JSON fixture — opaque stored data, not config distro
